title: Work & Business Spanish
shortSummary: Navigate the professional world in Spanish — write emails, attend meetings, discuss projects, and handle job interviews. Essential for anyone working with Spanish-speaking colleagues or clients.
whyItMatters: Professional Spanish opens career doors. If you can communicate effectively in a business context, you become valuable to any company with Spanish-speaking markets. Business Spanish follows specific conventions that differ from casual speech.
coreConcepts: Email conventions: Estimado/a, Atentamente, Saludos cordiales
Meeting vocabulary: reunión, orden del día, acta, plazo
Job vocabulary: puesto, sueldo, contrato, experiencia
Formal register: usted, subjunctive in business contexts
CV and cover letter conventions in Spanish-speaking countries
